title: ジャパンカップの後に・頂点へ！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gaaahhh! Defeated... Trounced... I totally lost!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No... no! I can't take it! I have to be the world's hella strongest! I need to be!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...But I'll accept my own weakness.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And I admit that you're incredibly powerful, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let us shake hands, amiga. I can bear the
humiliation of defeat as long as we congratulate
each other.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I got to race against you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I mean, yeah! Me too, El!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two exchange a firm handshake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, on the way back home...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Great job at the Japan Cup, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass! Did you see me race?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! I was watching intently from the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you here ever since then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waiting for me? But why? Wait, you don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I know quite well how strong El is. Calling herself
the world's strongest isn't just her ego talking.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And yet you bested her, Spe. Fair and square.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No one can doubt how strong you've become
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And thus, I would like to challenge you as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As a kindred spirit who shares the goal of making
it to the end of the journey we call a "race."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our fated battle shall take place at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The race where only the most resilient classic and
senior year Umamusume with enough votes get to
participate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let us determine who will reign supreme, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Special Week finds herself a rival
to race against in the Arima Kinen—the Beast,
Grass Wonder.
